Dear AC and AC players, 

      I have been playing this game since the OG days, and there have been both good and bad changes. The swimming update, the stash update, and even goop have all been amazing updates. Although many good things have happened, there have been bad things as well—laggy servers, more unbanned cheaters and bullies, and certain UI changes. As AC continues to grow, I hope that they can find the right pace and deliver more meaningful updates. Overall, you are doing a good job. Thank you for being a part of my life, and thank you for continuing to be a part of my life. 

PS: Maybe you could bring the OG map back? You could bring it back as a mode or something, but just a request.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on vr.
reviews.review_description: I've been playing since the mining update came out, and ever since I've played almost every day. Theres so much you can do while you're playing. Going mining, unlock new items, explore many maps, and most importantly play with friends. I'll be forever thankful for this game, and all the memories it gave me. 5 stars

Animal Company is probably my favorite and most played VR game, though I tend to see that a lot of people think otherwise. Personally I like it for its unique gameplay, with the environments, monsters, and items, the small bit of folks who like to actually play and aren’t just toxic, and other factors. Let me tell you about some problems I see people have.

1. Bad Community
This one’s perhaps the most obvious, and I see complaints of it ALL over games like this. There are people out there who are toxic killers, and who say terrible slurs and sexual jokes. I’m also going to tie in the voice moderation thing, and I get people’s problems. I wish I could relate, but I have NEVER had a problem with it. I encourage you to slightly engage against the people who bully you, but try not to retaliate too hard… And I get it when you say something but the AI takes it as completely something else, that’s really frustrating. But you can probably reach out assertively- and not aggressively- about that. I highly advise joining a private or no friendly fire (ff) code. Heh… but do you know how much fun it is to blow up some toxic nincompoops with an RPG? 

2. The updates are “bad”
Whether it’s revamps or just new maps entirely, I’m seeing that get a lot of hate too. Most obvious is the old spawn, which yes, I miss very much, but don’t get too hooked up on it. Try unplugging the brain deep within the dam facility with 3 people if you want a flashback, or ya know, just completely go down the ski hill. And some say the new maps and updates suck, but the thing is… have y’all even dared to explore the deepest reaches and get to the most thrilling and climactic points? There’s even bosses in this game now, people! And they recently added new skills to make even more personalized gameplay! Honestly, I think the updates are amazing, especially some like the Circus update or the Mountain update, both of which had a lot to offer. My one complaint is that currently, monster spawns are random in some areas (such as angler and puppet in the office) which just doesn’t make the monsters feel right or special sometimes.

3. Pay to win
If you ask me, this shouldn’t even be on my list. Sure, you sure can progress faster with real money, but you can avoid this just by working hard in game and going on adventures to places that you can actually get stuff (I recommend mines). Plus, there isn’t a such thing in the Adventure mode as winning, and money doesn’t even matter in Arena mode. And if people with their fancy gear are driving you crazy, just join a private code!

So there you have it. I ask that you apply these ideas to your gameplay if ya don’t already, and I just want to say I like this game for a fun and adventurous twist on horror, the systematic progression that gives the game purpose, and going on adventures with the people who want to just have fun as the game intended. Don’t take this game wrong for other people’s actions or for misunderstandings, whether they be yours or someone/something else’s, because you really can’t completely dis this game when it’s a universal problem.

Thanks for your time and your choice to read this. Have a good one, folks, and play some good Animal Company.

(If you’re really down on your luck, maybe join code “LVAN”.  I might be there, me and my friends can help you have fun.)

1. 	Lower Prices: It would be fantastic to see a reduction in skin prices. Making them more affordable could encourage more players to customize their characters.

	2. 	Promo Codes: Offering occasional promo codes would be a great way to reward loyal players and attract newcomers. Discounts on skins during special events could really boost engagement!

	3. 	Use of Company Coins: Allowing players to purchase skins at a lower price using company coins would make for a more rewarding experience. It encourages players to actively engage and earn those coins.

	4. 	Quest-Based Discounts: Introducing quests that align with the style of the animal skins could add an exciting layer to the game. Completing these quests for discounts would not only enhance gameplay but also make acquiring new skins more interactive and fun.

Overall, I love this game and the community around it. With these enhancements, I believe it could attract even more players and keep the existing ones engaged. Keep up the great work!

reviews.review_title: FIX THE PROBLEMS WITH YOUR GAME
reviews.review_description: I love AC and it's one of my favorite vr games but I won't delete this review until they fix the issues I'm about to list: 1. MODDERS: Ever since AC has been on steam, every other lobby is filled with modders every where. Some modders are good but the ones I'm talking about are the ones that ruin the game by doing something like writing curse-words with items. So please fix the modding problem. 2. VOICE MODERATION: The voice moderation is HORRIBLE and when I say horrible I mean HORRIBLE this AI stuff SUCKS like you could see people spam the n-word and they dont even get a voice warning. And one time I said the word 'but'. And is wasn't even 'butt' with 2  t's and I got muted for 24 hours and the reporting system barely works. 2½. TOXIC COMMUNITY: This one kinda goes with the last one but still. You can go into a public lobby and hear people be racist, sexist, homophopic, transphobic, etc. And AC just gives them a slap on the wrist for it. The only good update lately has been them kinda bringing back the OG map and that's it. Thank you if the person reading this actually read the whole thing. 3/5 star game only because of these issues  ⭐️⭐️⭐️

boy oh boy, do i have something to say. First off, THE ABSOLUTELY INSANE AMOUNT OF 1-SHOT INVENTIONS. like i was destroying this kid with a mace, when he pulled out a blue bat (that 1-shots) and i did. then he clowns on me and calls me bad at the game. like you are the one using inventions to kill a person with a MACE, how pathetic is that 😭

Secondly, the economy is getting destroyed by modders, pretty self-explanatory.

Thirdly, the space map has really awful physics and it's extremely hard to get back without a spaceship (those get griefed a lot) unless you have a TP gun, and there's no safe zone AND barely any iframes when you respawn. So you can get killed until you leave the game, and that's bad when you are in a good server (like a war server, love those)

So yeah, just delete some inventions that are OP and you could make an item for the space map that fixes the travel problem.

Both of my sons love this game, they play it for hours. My younger son gets upset because there's a lot of people in the game who trick him in order to get what he has acquired, ie, grapple, guns, ipads, etc. They say they want to trade and steal it, or they kill him and steal it or steal it when he sets it down or drops it, but he's learning not to trust people and to store his items instead of keeping them in his backpack. Other than people stealing he seems to really enjoy it. Lot's of cool updates and changes.

reviews.review_title: This is a very good game
reviews.review_description: I have been playing this since the first few updates and I must say, it keeps getting better and better with every update. There is so much to do and unlock, you can do stupid stuff with friends, and is very fun to hangout with the people. Sure there’s an occasional lagger or modder, but it is not the games fault, it’s the people’s fault. I looked over many low reviews on this game and almost all of them are about other people and not the game and it makes me peeved to read them. All I am trying to say is this is a very good game but you shouldn’t let others ruin it, you should let them fuel your experience in a fun way. High recommend👍

reviews.review_title: It's okay, but is getting worse
reviews.review_description:
This game was the best.
Around 2 years ago this game was released, and I first played it a couple months after.
It was the best game I had ever played.

It used to be a mix of gorilla tag and lethal company, a game where you would collect scraps, sell them to get money to buy better things etc.

You could blow up your friends and go on adventures, and the game even got updates every Tuesday.

I really enjoyed playing it with my friends every day until around march after they added office and stash.
This was a fun update for a while. You could get rare and colourful items and store them in the stash.
However people started trading these rare items, and people started stealing, making the community more and more mean.
And almost instantly people started using the stash to get unlimited money.
The glitches to get infinite money was so easy, no one started going to maps to get money.

Since then, the game has been built around the fact that people have money, instead of getting money, if you know what I mean.
Games like this are meant to be challenging, but now everybody has everything.

Then the "floor is lava" update came, (I have no idea what it was actually called) and I hated it.
It made the movement SO easy. Even in newer versions you can go across maps in seconds because of how quick you can go.

The game also kept getting many new items for movement, even after making the movement faster.

The map suddenly felt small. You could get anywhere you wanted, but the game was still fun.

Then came June (maybe July I can't remember fully) and then they  changed the map. It was tiny and ugly, and had many things missing from it. People hated it, and still do.
Now not only are people really fast, the map is also tiny, and it just removed the "adventure" part of the game. They have made it bigger, but it's not the same.

This was also the last update that added the lethal company part of the game.
They added a "broke AF" mode that was probably one of the best updates recently. It removed the stash and resets your money every so often. It was perfect, but the fact that it's not the main mode is the thing that bothers me.
Because what's the point in having nothing if you can choose to have everything?

So now no one plays the mode which is a shame because I really like it.


The game then - You started with nothing, collecting stuff to sell so you could buy the new items that were added every Tuesday. You could fight your friends and go on adventures.

The game now - You have everything. The only reason you play the game is to play with your friends or check out update that, 50% of the time, add nothing.
It's laggy, most of the community are not fun to play with and updates seem lazy.
New items that you buy are not properly tested and new items you find don't sell for anything.
The game is essentially VRChat with more items.
It's still fun to play, but significantly less fun than it used to be.


What the developer should do (in my opinion).
Add back money resets, remove stash and try their best to fix glitches.

99% of the players want the old map back.
While this seems like a good idea, it might just be the worst.
If they add the old map back, they need to do it PROPERLY, otherwise the memories of this game's past will be ruined.
They need to make the game about collecting money, they need to make the game more challenging and they need to make the game more adventurous.
They should also make it scary again and add terrifying monsters.

But unfortunately they won't... I believe they are too scared of little children spamming the game with bad reviews if the Devs make the game more scary and challenging (even though the game is pegi 12).


I will still play this game, I miss it when it was fun and we can only hope they can fix this game.
Otherwise, the game will be forgotten about very soon.

When I first started the animal company, I didn't really understand what to do. But then, over the time, I learned how to play and do all the other stuff. Although the game is getting a little boring now they keep coming out with really good updates. Some are ok but a lot of them are really good. I really hope that this game doesn't die out like how gorilla tag has. I just hope this game never dies. Because this game is so much fun. Although there are a lot of scammers and mean people and a lot of modders, but to me, that doesn't really matter, because to me the motors, sometimes make the game more fun, giving you like stuff to fight and do all that other stuff. But yeah, this game is really good.

reviews.review_title: I love it but there is one thing missing
reviews.review_description: The og map is what brought animal company together, i made friends there but I’m still happy you guys can keep working on the game even though coda and the other person who i forgot quit, and i love and i mean I LOVE how you guys put the og map at the bottom of the mountain.

I have been playing this game upon release now for more than two years and this is by far the best game I’ve ever played in my life. Even though I missed the old nap, I continue to play and make new friends and discover new places. Possibilities are endless. this game made me happy when I was going through hard times with my friends and has kept me going. If they developer is reading this, thank you for making this game you guys purely bring joy into my heart. ￼
